name: io.github.entropyvortex/ai-consensus-mcp
description: Stdio MCP server exposing the Consensus Validation Protocol — multi-model debate with confidence-weighted scoring, disagreement detection, and an optional judge synthesizer. Generic `consensus` tool plus task-tuned presets for code review, architecture debate, research synthesis, decision support, and incident postmortem.

runtimeArguments.name: subcommand
runtimeArguments.description: Run the MCP server (vs. the `install` subcommand).

runtimeArguments.name: --config
runtimeArguments.description: Absolute path to your consensus.config.json (providers, participants, optional judge).

environmentVariables.name: GROK_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: xAI API key. Required if your config declares an `xai` provider.

environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Anthropic API key. Required if your config declares an `anthropic` provider.

environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OpenAI API key. Required if your config declares an `openai` provider.

environmentVariables.name: GROQ_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Groq API key. Required if your config declares a `groq` provider.

environmentVariables.name: CONSENSUS_CONFIG
environmentVariables.description: Fallback config path if --config is omitted.
